type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Changes in TSP emission are due to a 21% increase in vehicle round trips on-site in 2014, in comparison to 2013, an increase in storage piles and surface area subject to wind erosion and a 7% decrease in total landfill gas sent to flares and engine (less LFG sent to flares, more LFG sent to engine).

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Changes in PM10 emissions are influenced by a 21% increase in vehicle round trips on-site in 2014, in comparison to 2013, an increase in storage piles and surface area subject to wind erosion and a 7% decrease in total landfill gas sent to flares and engine (less LFG sent to flares, more LFG sent to engine).

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The increase in total VOC emissions can be attributed to an increase in waste accepted at the south landfills, resulting in a 21% increase in VOC composition in LFG generated.
